description: CompositionMaroon round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a blue fabric tape on the inseam of the neckline, vented hem and graphic print on the frontFittingRegularWash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Spirituality hits a new high with this blue tee from tantra! Impress your grandma instead of that cute neighbour for a change! Wear this t-shirt with Sanskrit shlokas and show the world that it's hip to be spiritual. Pair it with jeans or shorts, and look absolutely peaceful. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2', Chest-39.5", Waist-32"
